Mixed order: Rifles for Watie book ($9.20) + Renew Life Adult Probiotic ($16.97); item subtotal $185.12 implies a third item not visible. Costco St Cloud #1344. Groceries plus significant pet food (dog food, cat chow), cleaning (Dawn), paper (Pom tissue). Pet items grouped into Home Supplies per user preference. Tax ($19.30) on pet food, cleaning, soda, prepared pizzas.
